attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.PROJECT_ROLE_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.MEANING, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.QUERY_LABOR_COST_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.START_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.END_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.DESCRIPTION, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.PROJECT_ROLE_ID, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.MENU_ID, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.DEFAULT_JOB_ID, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.DEFAULT_MIN_JOB_LEVEL, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.DEFAULT_MAX_JOB_LEVEL, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.RECORD_VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.FREEZE_RULES_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.DEFAULT_ACCESS_LEVEL, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.ROLE_PARTY_CLASS, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.STATUS_LEVEL, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B,
 (
 select PROJECT_ROLE_TYPE ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B
 minus
 select PROJECT_ROLE_TYPE ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B
 ) ACM 
 where 
 ACM.PROJECT_ROLE_TYPE = STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.PROJECT_ROLE_TYPE and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_ROLE_TYPES_B.REFRESH_DATETIME
